further_reading.title: MLOps: Continuous delivery and automation pipelines in machine learning
further_reading.why_relevant: Explains the transition from notebook-driven experimentation to modularized, automated ML pipelines and production delivery.

further_reading.title: MLOps machine learning model management
further_reading.why_relevant: Covers model registration, versioning, metadata, and deployment concerns that map directly to artifact governance and production handoff.

further_reading.title: Model Cards
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful for making model candidates reviewable by documenting datasets, evaluation results, intended use, and limitations.

notes: Module is predominantly pedagogical and workflow-oriented. It does not make dated statistical, incident, standards, security, pricing, or vendor-version claims that require inline citations under the stated rules.
